summary: W854 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while constructing the W853 homology-free selected-cochain route-data provider from existing W733/W732 route-data evidence. It projects W763 concrete leaves from one W732 route-data provider, drops the unused category-homology payload by retaining only the source-triangulation component, then feeds the constructed W853 provider into the W853 selected-cochain, left-calculus, and bounded-derived package routes. Product success remains false because the concrete W732 route-data provider, the nullary original-four-task completion witness, and the completion review packet are still absent.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W854 constructs the W853 homology-free provider from W732 route data, but the concrete W732 route-data provider is still an input rather than a constructed value.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The review packet still does not expose the immutable-contract negative fixtures, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct a concrete W732 boundary/relation target/closedness normalized source/endpoint route-data provider or reduce its remaining component blockers with exact Lean evidence.
Expose a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness after the W732 provider and stable Dbounded data are real.
Refresh the review packet fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
